_description: Complete registry of all data sources used in Budget Galaxy. Every number in the visualization must be traceable to an entry here.

de_bundeshaushalt.name: German Federal Budget (Bundeshaushalt)
de_bundeshaushalt.unit: EUR (thousands in source, converted to EUR)
de_bundeshaushalt.coverage: Federal expenditure by Einzelplan > Kapitel > Titel

de_gkv.name: Statutory Health Insurance (GKV)
de_gkv.source: Bundesministerium für Gesundheit (BMG), KJ1 Rechnungsergebnisse + KV45 vorläufige Ergebnisse
de_gkv.coverage: Total Leistungsausgaben by category: Krankenhausbehandlung, Ärztliche Behandlung, Arzneimittel, Zahnärztliche Behandlung, Krankengeld, Heilmittel, Hilfsmittel, Sonstige
de_gkv.notes: 2025 data is preliminary (vorläufig). National totals from BUND column.

de_rente.name: Statutory Pension Insurance (GRV)
de_rente.source: Deutsche Rentenversicherung, 'Rentenversicherung in Zeitreihen' 2025 (31st edition, DRV-Schriften Band 22)
de_rente.coverage: Total expenditure by: Rentenzahlungen, KVdR, Teilhabe/Rehabilitation, Verwaltungskosten, Sonstige. Revenue by: Beiträge, Bundeszuschüsse, Erstattungen, etc.
de_rente.notes: 2025 data from DRV Kennzahlen live page. Covers allgemeine RV + knappschaftliche RV combined.

de_ba.name: Federal Employment Agency (Bundesagentur für Arbeit)
de_ba.source: BA Jahresrechnungen (annual accounts), downloaded from arbeitsagentur.de
de_ba.coverage: SGB III Beitragshaushalt by 6 Kapitel: Passive Leistungen (ALG, Insolvenzgeld, KuG), Verwaltung, Aktive Arbeitsförderung, Eingliederungstitel, SGB II Personal, Finanzierung
de_ba.notes: 2020-2021 show massive COVID KuG spike (0.67→22.63 Mrd). 2025 data pending (Jahresrechnung expected ~Q3 2026).

de_pflege.name: Long-term Care Insurance (Soziale Pflegeversicherung)
de_pflege.source: Bundesministerium für Gesundheit, Finanzentwicklung der sozialen Pflegeversicherung
de_pflege.coverage: Leistungsausgaben by category: Pflegegeld, Vollstationäre Pflege, Pflegesachleistung, Soz. Sicherung Pflegepersonen, Verhinderungspflege, Tages-/Nachtpflege, Kurzzeitpflege, Sonstige

de_dguv.name: Statutory Accident Insurance (DGUV)
de_dguv.source: DGUV 'Statistiken für die Praxis 2024' + 'Geschäfts- und Rechnungsergebnisse 2023'
de_dguv.format: PDF (extracted manually, verified against multiple publications)
de_dguv.coverage: Expenditure by: Renten, Heilbehandlung, Verwaltung/Verfahren/Sonstiges, Prävention
de_dguv.notes: 2025 data expected ~mid-2026. Verwaltung for 2016-2019 interpolated between 2015 and 2020 official anchor points.

de_laender_destatis.name: German States - Detailed (Destatis Rechnungsergebnis)
de_laender_destatis.source: Destatis Statistischer Bericht, Rechnungsergebnis des öffentlichen Gesamthaushalts
de_laender_destatis.notes: Destatis publishes with 3+ year lag. 2022+ not yet available. 2017 exists but 2014-2016 and 2018 never published.

de_laender_eurostat.name: German States - COFOG Aggregate (Eurostat)
de_laender_eurostat.source: Eurostat gov_10a_exp API, sector S1312 (State government)
de_laender_eurostat.coverage: National aggregate (no per-state breakdown), 10 COFOG categories
de_laender_eurostat.notes: 2024 data is provisional. No per-state breakdown. Used as fallback for years without Destatis detail.

de_laender_kassenergebnis.name: German States - Quarterly Cash Statistics
de_laender_kassenergebnis.coverage: 16 states, expenditure by TYPE (not function): Personalausgaben, Sachaufwand, Zinsausgaben, Investitionen, etc.
de_laender_kassenergebnis.notes: NO functional breakdown (Aufgabenbereiche) available from this source. 2025 is partial (Jan-Sep). Cash-basis accounting differs from Eurostat ESA2010 accrual.

de_kommunen_eurostat.name: German Municipalities - COFOG Aggregate (Eurostat)
de_kommunen_eurostat.source: Eurostat gov_10a_exp API, sector S1313 (Local government)

us_budget.name: US Federal Budget
us_budget.coverage: Agency > Federal Account > Sub-Account, obligated amounts

fr_budget.name: French State Budget (PLF/LFI)
fr_budget.source: Projet de Loi de Finances, data.gouv.fr + data.economie.gouv.fr
fr_budget.coverage: 2020-2025: Ministère > Mission > Programme > Action. 2015-2019: Mission > Programme > Action (no ministry codes in source).

sources_by_year.2015: data.economie.gouv.fr PLF 2015 BG nomenclature par destination (from PLF 2015 dataset)
sources_by_year.2017: LFI 2017 column from PLF 2018 BG-Msn-Dest. PLF 2017 source file is truncated (6/30 missions) on both data.gouv.fr and data.economie.gouv.fr.
sources_by_year.2019: data.gouv.fr PLF 2019 BG-Msn-Dest (from PLF 2019 budget général dataset)
sources_by_year.2020-2025: data.gouv.fr PLF YYYY dépenses (new format with ministry codes)

fr_budget.notes: 2015-2019 use older CSV format without ministry codes, so trees are grouped by Mission instead of Ministère. 2017 uses LFI (enacted) rather than PLF (proposed) because the PLF 2017 source file is truncated at the portal level. 2020-2024 trees include Sécurité Sociale branch. 2015-2019 and 2025 are state budget only.

fr_securite_sociale.name: French Social Protection (Protection Sociale)
fr_securite_sociale.source: DREES Comptes de la Protection Sociale, data.gouv.fr
fr_securite_sociale.coverage: 6 risk branches: Santé (Health), Vieillesse-Survie (Pensions), Famille (Family), Emploi (Employment), Logement (Housing), Pauvreté-Exclusion (Poverty). Sub-branches for 2020-2024.
fr_securite_sociale.download_url: data.gouv.fr dataset: Comptes de la protection sociale
fr_securite_sociale.notes: Covers ALL social protection regimes (Sécurité Sociale + State + local + complementary + private). Total 2024: 932.5 Mrd EUR. This is broader than just Sécurité Sociale institutional spending.

uk_local_authorities.name: UK Local Authorities (England)
uk_local_authorities.source: MHCLG Revenue Outturn Multi-Year Time Series
uk_local_authorities.unit: GBP (thousands in source, converted to GBP integers)
uk_local_authorities.coverage: 13 service areas: Education, Adult Social Care, Children's Social Care, Police, Fire, Highways, Housing, Public Health, Environmental, Cultural, Planning, Central, Other. Also individual LA breakdown for latest year.
uk_local_authorities.notes: England only. Scotland, Wales, NI have separate devolved administrations.
